en.welcome:
Welcome to Inter Ethiopia Solutions Agent Registration Bot

Please choose your application type below.
en.support:
For support, contact Inter Ethiopia Solutions
Email: agentapply@internethiopia.com
Phone: +251XXXXXXXXX
WhatsApp: +251XXXXXXXXX
en.choose_language: Please choose your language / ቋንቋ ይምረጡ
en.resume_prompt: You have an incomplete application. Would you like to resume where you stopped?
en.submitted: Your application has been submitted successfully.
en.timeline: Our team will respond within 3-5 business days.
en.status_not_found: No application found yet. Use /register to submit your application.
en.status_found:
Your application status: {status}
Our team will contact you soon.
en.terms_required: Please type I Agree to continue or Cancel to stop.
en.file_required: Please upload a file or image.
en.file_too_large: File too large. Max size is {size}MB.
en.file_unsupported: Unsupported file format. Please upload JPG, PNG, or PDF.
en.territory_unavailable: Sorry, this area is already reserved. Please select another nearby area.
en.register_choose_type: Choose your application type: Sales Agent / Installer Agent / Sales + Installer Agent

am.welcome:
እንኳን ወደ Inter Ethiopia Solutions የወኪል ምዝገባ ቦት በደህና መጡ።

እባክዎ የማመልከቻ አይነት ይምረጡ።
am.support:
ለእገዛ Inter Ethiopia Solutions ያግኙ
ኢሜይል: agentapply@internethiopia.com
ስልክ: +251XXXXXXXXX
ዋትስአፕ: +251XXXXXXXXX
am.choose_language: Please choose your language / ቋንቋ ይምረጡ
am.resume_prompt: ያልተጠናቀቀ ማመልከቻ አለዎት። ከተወውበት ቦታ መቀጠል ይፈልጋሉ?
am.timeline: ቡድናችን በ3-5 የስራ ቀናት ውስጥ ምላሽ ይሰጣል።
am.yes_no_required: እባክዎ አዎ ወይም አይ ብለው ይመልሱ።
am.phone_invalid: የስልክ ቁጥር ቅርጸት ልክ አይደለም። +2519XXXXXXXX ወይም 09XXXXXXXX ይጠቀሙ።
am.terms_required: ለመቀጠል I Agree ይጻፉ ወይም Cancel ይላኩ።
am.file_too_large: ፋይሉ ከፍተኛ መጠን አለው። ከፍተኛ መጠን {size}MB ነው።
am.file_unsupported: ያልተደገፈ ፋይል ቅርጸት ነው። JPG, PNG, ወይም PDF ይጠቀሙ።
am.territory_unavailable: ይቅርታ፣ ይህ አካባቢ አስቀድሞ ተይዟል። ሌላ ቅርብ አካባቢ ይምረጡ።
am.register_choose_type: የማመልከቻ አይነትዎን ይምረጡ: ሽያጭ ወኪል / ኢንስታለር ወኪል / ሁለቱም
